name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Ophidia series GG mini shoulder bag. As one of the brand's representative fabrics, GG denim is inspired by 1930s vintage designs. On this denim, the classic beige and ebony colorways are reinterpreted in black and gray for a sincere tribute to the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern is a bright highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag, showcasing a unique style. Black and gray GG denim, silver-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining with double-G. Handle: 3cm(H) chain strap (50cm(H)) lock closure. Weight: approx. 0.5kg.

Made in Italy
